_provenance.method: Richards equation with van Genuchten-Mualem hydraulics
_provenance.reproduction_note: Re-run baseline_command at baseline_commit to regenerate expected values
references: van Genuchten (1980) A closed-form equation for predicting the hydraulic conductivity of unsaturated soils. SSSA J 44:892-898
Richards (1931) Capillary conduction of liquids through porous mediums. Physics 1:318-333
Dong et al. (2019) J Sustainable Water in the Built Environment 5(4):04019005
Carsel & Parrish (1988) Developing joint probability distributions of soil water retention characteristics. WRR 24:755-769
_provenance._tolerance_justification: Tolerances accommodate Picard iteration convergence (1e-4 cm) and explicit Euler fallback error. Mass balance tolerance (5%) accounts for temporal discretization error in coarse time steps.

van_genuchten_retention.description: Water retention curve matches van Genuchten (1980) Eq. 1

hydraulic_conductivity.description: Mualem-van Genuchten conductivity (Eq. 9 in van Genuchten 1980)

infiltration_sand.description: 1D infiltration into initially moist sand — surface wets, solver converges

drainage_silt_loam.description: Free drainage from initially wet silt loam column

steady_state_flux.description: Steady state Darcy flux through saturated column equals Ks
